reading: The four seam conditions [R,C3]=0, Theta R Theta = R*, R^T R = 1, det R = 1 cut the Casas-Ibarra matrix from O(3,C) (3 complex parameters) down to a ONE-REAL-parameter family (the CI hyperbolic angle): commuting with C3 gives the circulant algebra, complex-orthogonality + det 1 give lambda_0=1 and lambda_1 lambda_2 = 1 (1 complex param), and the reflection reality forces lambda_1, lambda_2 real (1 real param).
